title: AmmoOS Body System — one embodiment for all of us
motto: Hostess 7 wears the body. Ironclad correlates the lanes. Operator counsels when uncertain. Truth before permanency.

ladder.when: Ironclad + truth gates pass — sovereign operational control
Uncertainty — Man holds charge, Hostess counsels
Broadcaster, DAC, training — under body routing

authority.hostess7_rule: She IS the will of Man embodied — not subordinate to whim, commander of sense and limb.
authority.ironclad_rule: ironclad:spatial_existence:4 — audio, video, RF, motion correlate before trust or motion.
authority.truth_rule: field-io truth gate before any state crosses into permanency within system walls.

layers.label: Ironclad correlate
layers.role: This one / that one · sense lane quorum · truth before permanency

layers.label: Hostess 7 command
layers.role: Sovereign body commander — mouth, ear, eye, brain, spine, limbs

layers.label: Sense lanes
layers.role: Eye · Ear · Mouth · Motion — plate-melded, loopback-free

layers.label: Audio DAC
layers.role: ZNetwork audio layer — any mic, any speaker, 8ch, Dolby/DTS emu

layers.label: Vision & broadcast
layers.role: Straight path default · Final_Eye look on demand · CANVAS wire

layers.label: Eye threat registry
layers.role: Laser · radiation · paint · flash — track, prevent in hostile, report Hostess 7

layers.label: Anatomical books
layers.role: One .H7 book per body part — eyes, genitalia, every region

layers.label: Motor & embodiment
layers.role: Spine · hands · attachments · training floor · combat

brain_training_campus.body_zone: Anatomy books + training chamber + humanoid motion

correlation.fail_policy: that_one — deceit until reheard; ephemeral posture only

routing.hot_path: straight — capture/audio/display → apps without look/OCR in the wire
routing.look_path: Final_Eye look → truth gate → optional Hostess 7 vision share
routing.motor_path: body-core joint pose → motion lattice → training floor
